Pandowdy Apple IIe Emulator
Table of Contents

Enum SlotNumber

Namespace
Pandowdy.EmuCore.Interfaces
Assembly
Pandowdy.EmuCore.dll

Defines the slot numbers for Apple IIe expansion cards.

public enum SlotNumber

Fields

Slot1 = 0

Expansion slot 1.

Slot2 = 1

Expansion slot 2.

Slot3 = 2

Expansion slot 3 (typically 80-column card).

Slot4 = 3

Expansion slot 4.

Slot5 = 4

Expansion slot 5.

Slot6 = 5

Expansion slot 6 (typically disk controller).

Slot7 = 6

Expansion slot 7.

Remarks

The Apple IIe provides seven expansion slots numbered 1 through 7. Slot 0 is reserved for system use and is not accessible to expansion cards. Each slot provides access to three address spaces: I/O ($C0x0-$C0xF), ROM ($Cx00-$CxFF), and shared extended ROM ($C800-$CFFF).
